top_findings: API usage-doc coverage is low: 15.65% (1468 API pages detected)
Freshness visibility is weak: only 9.19% pages show last updated

analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.moov.io crawled 1686 pages with 100% coverage and 91.5% overall confidence. Critical gaps identified: 9 confirmed broken internal links, 22.14% SEO/geo issue rate, and only 15.65% API reference coverage despite 1468 API pages detected. Freshness metadata present on only 9.19% of pages. Example reliability estimated at 85.25%, indicating potential code drift or maintenance issues.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage: 1686 of 1686 pages examined (100%)
High overall audit confidence at 91.5% with strong link verification (95%)
No repository navigation broken links; all 9 broken links are user-facing documentation
Large API surface detected (1468 pages) provides foundation for improvement
Example reliability at 85.25% shows majority of code samples likely functional
risks: 9 confirmed broken internal links degrade user navigation and trust
22.14% SEO/geo issue rate severely impacts discoverability and search ranking
Only 15.65% API reference coverage leaves 84% of API pages without usage documentation
9.19% freshness visibility prevents users from assessing content currency and reliability
14.75% of examples may be broken or outdated, risking developer onboarding failure
Low API coverage with 1468 detected pages suggests systematic gap in integration guidance
Missing last-updated dates on 90%+ pages creates compliance and maintenance tracking risk

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 9 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Implement systematic last-updated metadata across all 1686 pages
Audit and remediate SEO/geo issues affecting 22.14% of pages (373 pages)
Create usage documentation for top 50 most-accessed API endpoints (targeting 1468 API pages)
Validate and update the 14.75% potentially broken code examples

limitations: External audit cannot verify accuracy of technical content, code correctness, or business logic
API coverage detection relies on page structure patterns; actual API completeness requires internal validation
Example reliability is estimated through static analysis; runtime execution success not guaranteed
Crawl limited to publicly accessible pages; authenticated or gated content not evaluated
SEO/geo issue detection based on technical markers; actual search engine ranking impact requires live monitoring
